# Generated Go files exempted from the 300-line ceiling enforced by
# scripts/check-go-file-length.sh.
#
# Hand-written files should be split instead of added here.
#
# Do NOT add new entries without explicit review — the default answer is
# "split the file", not "allowlist it".

# Code generated from the curated model catalog snapshot.
internal/registry/models.go

# Code generated by scripts/gen_email_templates.
internal/email/templates.go

# Existing long integration handler tests predating the file-length check.
internal/handler/in_connections_create_test.go
internal/handler/in_connections_revoke_test.go
